case_title: KAPLAN, BRADLEY P. VS FINNEGAN, JAMES E.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,594.61 FILED BY KAPLAN, BRADLEY P. AS TO DEFENDANT FINNEGAN, JAMES E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAPLAN, BRADLEY P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FINNEGAN, JAMES E. $1,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,675.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2500 AND ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. (DEFENDANT SHALL BE CREDITED FOR ANY PRIOR PAYMENT FOR PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY DAMAGES) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FINNEGAN, JAMES E.
